releaseNotes:
New: Cast button on Live TV and Movie/TV Show playback - send what you're watching to a Chromecast, Android TV, or Google TV device. Movie and TV Show pages now show the official clean title and US content rating from TMDB instead of the provider's often-mangled title.

Fixed: on a TV Show's page, pressing down from Play with your remote skipped right over the cast photos to the season picker - they're now reachable with the D-pad like everything else on the page.
